name: oracle-agent-platform
description: Build validation scripts for the Oracle Agent Flask/Vercel deployment.

scripts.build: python3 -m py_compile app.py gui/app.py src/oracle/agent_system.py && node --check gui/static/js/app.js && python3 -c "from app import app; client = app.test_client(); assert client.get('/').status_code == 200; assert client.get('/api/status').status_code == 200" && VERCEL=1 python3 -c "from app import app; client = app.test_client(); assert client.get('/').status_code == 200; assert client.get('/api/status').status_code == 200"
